review_title: BettrData - fantastic tool to scale your data ingest operation
author: Scott S.
pros: ease of use, ease of implementation, support provided by BettrData, reporting functions, pattern learning by tool allows our analysts to focus on exceptions thereby building efficiency.
cons: We are very pleased with our purchase decision, if I were to pick one con the tool is only a handful years in development so many off the shelf integrations (ex. Shopify) are custom work at the moment but I am certain the development roadmap with capture this use case in months ahead.

review_title: Take your compnay to the next level
description: Bettrdata has helped our compnay each the next level of technology, data garthering and management
author: Chaim L.
pros: Overall ease of use, top of the line anayltics and API setup... Friendly customer service and caring staff
cons: In the begining we needed to meet a few times, however after that Bettrdata caught up quickly and everything went smotth

author: Nikki R.
pros: The support team is phenomenal. Very quick to respond and help you figure out whatever problem you may be having. Autoconvert is my absolute dream come true; the less time I need to actually spend in the tool is wonderful.
cons: There is a bit of a learning curve for those who don't have a computer coding background. I tend to think I'm computer literate but I've come across little nuances that had to be explained by the support team to fix issues I was running into.

review_title: Our Go-To Solution for Data Onboarding
description: BettrData has streamlined our data onboarding process. The platform is user-friendly, making it easy to process and manage client data. The BettrData team provides excellent support; they are always responsive, knowledgeable, and ready to assist with any issues that arise. Additionally, they are genuinely open to feedback and proactive in implementing enhancements, ensuring that the platform continually evolves to meet user needs.
author: Ursula A.
pros: -Ease of use, both internally and for our clients -Quick response time from the BettrData support team
cons: At this point, we've found it to be an efficient, user-friendly, and well-supported solution without any cons impacting our data onboarding process.

description: Couldn't ask for a better product from a better company. While the program is great and makes my life much easier, the customer care I receive from the company is unparalleled. They are always very quick to respond with thorough explanations.
author: William W.
pros: I have spent years in data conversion and BettrData is likely the best single program I've used so far. The idea is very straightforward and appeals to the user's desire for a simple interface, while also offering much more depth when needed.
cons: For some things that I think should be a simple solution, code snippets are needed. These have been going away as new enhancements are released.

author: David E.
pros: BetterData core product is very good but the custom work we contracted with BettrData to build and provide for us was the real difference.
cons: Althought the BettrData portal is full featured, we are moving to a more api integrated environment with BettrData. BettrData continues to update/enhance there offering based on requests. Long term I see this integrated environment the key component to our relationship.

author: Casey H.
pros: The team at BettrData is great to work with and they have helped systemize what was previously a clunky process into a smooth pipeline.
cons: None at this time. The team has been great to work with and have been responsive whenever I reach out.

author: Tracey K.
pros: BettrData provides a robust platform that enables our ETL needs and is easy to use and understand. Additionally, the staff are great to work with and knowledgeable.
cons: There has not been a downside for us at this point.

description: Product functions efficiently, and helps us automate a lot of previously manual tasks
author: Steve H.
pros: Ability to automatically ingest, map data
cons: Do not have any negatives. BettrData support team is helpful

author: Jack T.
pros: BettrData has been a great partner for us in building a scalable product, automating our data flow, making improvements consistently, and being very available for support.
cons: I could have used the platform more efficiently from the start and suggested a more impactful roadmap initially.
